info.title: Printify Public API
info.description:
## Getting started

Printify API enables you to automate product and order creation for a variety of scenarios,
including integration with your on-site design generator, on-site product customization and more.

tags.name: Shops
tags.description: Manage Printify shops and shop connections. Retrieve shop information and disconnect shops from your account.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Browse the Printify catalog including blueprints, print providers, product variants, and shipping information. Explore available products and their customization options.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Create, update, delete, and manage products in your shop. Publish products to sales channels and handle product lifecycle events including GPSR compliance information.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Create and manage orders including standard orders, Printify Express orders, and order lifecycle management. Calculate shipping costs and track order fulfillment.

tags.name: Uploads
tags.description: Upload and manage images and assets. Upload images from URLs or base64-encoded content, retrieve upload information, and archive uploaded images.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Configure webhooks to receive notifications about order and product events. Create, update, and delete webhook subscriptions.

tags.name: V2 Catalog Blueprints
tags.description: V2 API endpoints for catalog and shipping information. Retrieve shipping methods and variant-specific shipping details using JSON API format.

get.summary: Retrieve list of shops in a Printify account

get.summary: Retrieve a list of variants of a blueprint from a specific print provider
get.description:
Retrieves the list of of variants options for the Print Provider and Blueprint.
    Those form the set of options available for customization Product (Blueprint)
    on particular manufacturer (Print Provider).

show-out-of-stock.name: show-out-of-stock
show-out-of-stock.description:
Depending on the value, it shows all variants or only those not out of stock. Without passing this query param, the list will contain only those variants in stock.
0 - show only variants that are in stock.
1 - also show variants out of stock (all variants).

sku.name: sku
sku.description: Filter results by product SKU - response will contain only those orders that have at least one product with passed SKU

host.name: host
host.description: Host works as a safeguard: the deletion will only be performed if the host matches the webhook's host
